question: The main arterial trunk supplying the infra temporal fossa is:

history.message:
Agent1 Round 1: The infra temporal fossa receives its primary blood supply from branches of the maxillary artery, which bifurcates into the middle meningeal and superficial temporal arteries. Answer C (Maxillary artery)
